title: Furry LitePack
description: This is a light modpack containing mostly quality-of-life mods, in-game voice chat, and various in-game player customizations
body:
This modpack preserves the vanilla experience while putting a different spin on the final stage of progression and extending the post end progression with additional content.

_End fight under rework in latest version but functional_

Contains various quality-of-life features including: 
- Proximity voice chat,
- Various player customizations
- Iris Shaders
- Distant Horizons + Bobby

New Recipes:
- Better equipment recycling via Blasting and Cutting
- Cut Wool -> String
- Cut Leather -> Rabbit Hide
- Smoking Rotten Flesh -> Leather

May cause chunk tearing in Vanilla worlds!!!
